title: alpinia densibracteata
intro: Alpinia densibracteata, also known as the lesser galangal, is a species of flowering plant in the ginger family (Zingiberaceae). This plant is traditionally used in Southeast Asian herbal medicine, known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Alpinia densibracteata include its ability to alleviate digestive issues, reduce fever, and provide relief from colds and respiratory problems. Alpinia densibracteata is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and decoctions, and is also used in traditional cooking in Southeast Asia.
